string.description: Unquoted or quoted text value for server names, paths, and directive arguments

size.description: Size value with optional suffix for buffer sizes and body limits

time.signature: number + unit (ms, s, m, h, d)
time.description: Time duration with unit suffix for timeouts, keepalive intervals, and cache expiry

boolean.description: Boolean flag using on/off convention for enabling or disabling features

address.description: Network address for listen, proxy_pass, and upstream server directives

path.description: Filesystem path for root, alias, access_log, error_log, and include directives

variable.description: Nginx variable prefixed with dollar sign, both built-in and user-defined
